subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down from Our presence unto a people who understand. Verily, it is the Sign of God amidst all else, and His Most Great Mystery in what hath been and what is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لقوم یفقهون انه لایه الله فیما سواه و سره الاعظم فیما کان و ما
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @exhortations and counsels
